name: CustomerNameUniqueness
description: Customer name must be unique. If GetByName returns OK (customer exists), creation is rejected.
enforcement: GetByName check before Insert; BadRequest('There is already another customer with the given name')

name: SmsSendAsLengthBounds
description: SMSSendAs must be between SmsSendAsMinLength and SmsSendAsMaxLength (GeneralConstants). Violation returns localized error.
enforcement: Length guard before Insert; returns localized message

name: DaysBeforeSMSDraftDeletionClamp
description: DaysBeforeSMSdraftDeletion is clamped to [1, 9]. If null → default 3. Values outside range are silently clamped (no error).

name: MonthToDeleteBroadcastClamp
description: MonthToDeleteBroadcast clamped to [6, 60]. MonthToDeleteMessages clamped to [1, 60]. SuperAdmin-only fields.

name: SuperAdminOnlyFields
description: Name, Segment, KvhxAddress, EconomicId, MaxNumberOfLicenses, OneFlowDocumentId, MonthToDelete* can only be updated by SuperAdmin.

name: VoiceNumberIdUniqueness
description: VoiceNumberId (if set and not shared) must not be occupied by a different customer. Shared voice numbers bypass this check.

name: VoiceSendAsSuperAdminOnly
description: VoiceSendAs can only be changed by SuperAdmin when Infobip is in use. Non-admin attempt returns Forbid.

name: DateLastUpdatedUtcOnUpdate
description: Every customer update sets DateLastUpdatedUtc = UtcNow before persisting.
